title: keteleeria evelyniana var. hainanensis
intro: Keteleeria evelyniana var. hainanensis is a plant species belonging to the Pinaceae family, commonly known as a coniferous tree native to China and Vietnam. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health problems. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and branches of Keteleeria evelyniana var. hainanensis are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
